briefing_text:
SAGE Morning Briefing — Friday, May 01 2026
Business: Marathon Deli

Health Score: 76/100
6 recommendations | $10,771 total impact

Top actions:
  [SHELF] Pre-order 2-week supply to lock in current price ($1,680)
  [SHELF] Monitor — within acceptable buffer ($528)
  [SHELF] Negotiate direct delivery for orders >$25 or push Marathon app ($4,368)

recommendations.title: Pre-order 2-week supply to lock in current price
recommendations.description: Lamb Shoulder (gyro/shawarma base) — Price +7.0% vs baseline — primary protein cost driver

recommendations.title: Monitor — within acceptable buffer
recommendations.description: Overtime Labor — Michael Rivera (4h OT this week) — Supervisor working 44h this week (4h above threshold)

recommendations.title: Negotiate direct delivery for orders >$25 or push Marathon app

recommendations.title: Marathon's differentiation is quality/variety — no need to match

pulse_summary:
PULSE BRIEFING — Friday May 01, 02:21 PM

✅ TODAY: $2904.4 earned, $5669.6 projected vs $3000.0 target

reviews.author: GreekFoodLover
reviews.text: Fatima's shawarma is unreal. Came back three Fridays in a row just for that. Marathon is a gem.

reviews.author: NightOwlUMD
reviews.text: Food is great but had a cold gyro once — felt like it sat too long. Staff was apologetic though.

reviews.author: TerpFan2024
reviews.text: Best late-night spot near UMD. The gyro is massive and the staff is super fast after midnight.

reviews.author: BudgetStudentEats
reviews.text: $14 for a gyro wrap seems steep vs Chipotle at $11 nearby. Worth it for the taste but the gap is growing.
